title: drosera filiformis var. filiformis
intro: Drosera filiformis var. filiformis, also known as the slender-leaved sundew, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the Droseraceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of this plant are said to include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties, as well as potential benefits for digestive health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
